pkgmetadata.longdescription: Keras Layer Normalization[[Version](httpsimg.shields.iopypivkeras-layer-normalization.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectkeras-layer-normalization)[License](httpsimg.shields.iopypilkeras-layer-normalization.svg)Implementation of the paper [Layer Normalization](httpsarxiv.orgpdf1607.06450.pdf) Installbashpip install keras-layer-normalization Usagepythonfrom tensorflow import kerasfrom keras_layer_normalization import LayerNormalizationinput_layer keras.layers.Input(shape(2, 3))norm_layer LayerNormalization()(input_layer)model keras.models.Model(inputsinput_layer, outputsnorm_layer)model.compile(optimizeradam, lossmse, metrics{},)model.summary()
